prompt: Create a cinematic vertical luxury automotive brand poster for VTX Broadcast Systems. The scene shows one classic silver-gray 1970s Japanese fastback sports coupe in perfect side profile, low stance, black multi-spoke wheels, subtle orange brake detail, polished body reflections, and a small VTX decal on the door. One well-dressed man in a dark navy tailored suit and black shoes leans casually against the car near the rear quarter panel, hands in pockets, confident executive pose, face softly anonymized/blurred. Behind them are enormous freestanding metallic gold letters spelling “VTX,” glowing warmly from behind and towering over the car. Use a dark studio environment with a black-to-deep-blue background, warm amber rim lighting, moody high-contrast commercial photography, glossy wet reflective floor with clear reflections of the car, man, and giant letters. Include exactly five visible text elements: the small top-left logo text “VTX,” the small top-left subtitle “VTX BROADCAST SYSTEMS,” the huge background letters “VTX,” the small door decal “VTX,” and the bottom centered slogan “BROADCAST THE MOMENT” in widely spaced amber capitals. Composition should be premium, masculine, dramatic, symmetrical enough for a brand campaign, with the car occupying the lower middle, the man right of center, and the giant letters filling the background. Photorealistic, sharp, editorial advertising style, 2:3 vertical aspect ratio.
